## Testing

Describe how you tested the changes:

- [ ] `python -m pytest tests -v` passes locally
- [ ] `python scripts/check_data_integrity.py` exits 0
- [ ] Manually loaded the node in ComfyUI and verified behavior
- [ ] JSON files validated (`import json; json.load(...)`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the project conventions (DbC preconditions/postconditions, no underscore tags, `@`-prefixed artist tokens)
- [ ] New or modified data files pass integrity checks
- [ ] No `__pycache__` or `.pyc` files included
- [ ] PR title is descriptive (e.g. `fix: handle empty artist field gracefully`)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated if this is a user-visible change
